text..hero-sub: Drivers find and reserve open spots in seconds with live IoT data. Operators manage spaces, monitor occupancy and grow revenue from a single dashboard.
text..drivers-section .section-sub: Cut the time you spend hunting for a spot. SpotGo brings real-time availability and one-tap reservations to every driver - pricing and plans are defined by each parking operator, so you always see local rates upfront.
text..operators-section .section-sub: Manage every space from one dashboard. Define your own pricing, subscription plans and access rules - then monitor occupancy, classify users and grow revenue per spot.
text..pricing-section h2: Transparent for drivers, flexible for operators
text..pricing-section .section-sub: Drivers always see local rates upfront - set by each parking operator. Operators choose a SpotGo platform plan that fits their portfolio.
text..driver-card-left h3: Pricing is set by each parking operator
text..driver-card-left > p: SpotGo does not sell driver subscriptions. Hourly rates, monthly passes and discounts are defined by each parking lot, so you always pay the local price - no surprise fees from us. Compare options on the live map and reserve in seconds.
text..rates-note: Rates shown are examples. Actual prices are defined by each operator.
text..testimonials-section h2: Loved by drivers, trusted by operators
text..team-section .section-sub: Five Software Engineering students building SpotGo — combining different strengths, stacks and perspectives to make smart parking happen.
text..cta-inner p: Drivers find spots faster. Operators run lots smarter. Pick your side and get started in minutes.
text..footer-tagline: Smart parking for modern cities. Real-time, reliable, reserved.
text..footer-made: Made with care for drivers everywhere.

values: Live IoT sensors show open spots across every connected lot - no more guessing.
Reserve before you leave home and drive straight to your spot.
Smart alerts before your time runs out - extend with a single tap.
Save the lots you use most and rebook your usual spot instantly.
Frictionless entry and exit - your reservation is your pass, no tickets to handle.
Encrypted, one-tap checkout with all major cards and wallets - at the price set by each lot.
Configure lots, zones and individual bays with capacity, services and operating hours.
Track every spot's status live - occupied, reserved or available - across all your sites.
Set your own hourly rates, dynamic pricing, monthly passes and discount rules per lot.
Segment drivers (visitor, resident, employee, VIP) and define access rules for each group.
Occupancy trends, peak hours and revenue breakdowns to drive better decisions.
Dynamic pricing suggestions and reservation flows that maximize spot turnover.
Browse the live map and filter by price, services, or distance.
Choose your time slot and confirm with secure one-tap payment.
Navigate to your spot. Extend or rate your stay from the app.
"I have not circled a block in months. SpotGo finds me a spot before I even leave home."
"Occupancy across our 4 lots is finally visible in one place. Revenue per spot is up 22%."
"Setup took an afternoon. Our staff now spend less time on the floor and more on customers."
As a driver, can I cancel a reservation?
How do operators onboard their parking lots?
Do you support EV charging spots?
Each connected lot uses IoT ground sensors that report spot status every few seconds to our cloud, which streams updates straight to driver and operator dashboards.
Yes. Cancellations made more than 15 minutes before your start time are fully refunded.
We provide IoT sensor kits and a guided setup. Most single-lot operators are live within a day; larger portfolios get a dedicated success manager.
Live occupancy, peak-hour heatmaps, revenue per spot, reservation conversion and side-by-side site comparisons - all exportable.
Absolutely. Drivers can filter by EV, and operators can flag and price EV-enabled bays separately.
